summary: Completed testing of Cohort Lifecycle feature. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend admin cohort management UI and candidate cohort page verified working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console) - same as previous iterations

critical_code_review_comments: Cohort lifecycle validation correctly enforces max 1 active + 1 registering cohort
Admin UI shows lifecycle summary cards (Active Cohort / Registering Cohort) at top of page
Create Cohort modal includes helpful note: 'Only one active and one registering cohort allowed at a time'
Status dropdown on each cohort card allows admin to change status
CohortPage correctly shows enrolled view for users with cohort enrollment
CohortPage shows registration view for non-enrolled users when registering cohort exists
Backend properly validates status changes and prevents duplicate active/registering cohorts
seed_data_creation: Test cohorts created during testing: TEST_March_2026_Batch_* (registering status)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cohort lifecycle feature fully implemented and tested. Free Trial User is enrolled in 'February 2026 Batch' cohort (status: completed). There is a registering cohort 'TEST_March_2026_Batch_43b362' available for registration testing. Admin cohort management includes lifecycle summary, status change dropdowns, and validation messages.

admin_create_cohort_registering.details: Admin can create cohort with status 'registering'

admin_create_cohort_active.details: Admin can create cohort with status 'active'

only_one_registering_allowed.details: Creating second registering cohort fails with error message

only_one_active_allowed.details: Creating second active cohort fails with error message

enrolled_candidate_see_cohort_details.details: GET /api/resources/cohort/my-enrollment returns enrolled cohort with sections/resources

cohort_page_enrolled_view.details: CohortPage shows 'My Cohort' header, cohort info, and materials section for enrolled users

cohort_page_registration_view.details: CohortPage shows registration card when registering cohort exists (verified via API)

admin_cohort_lifecycle_summary.details: Admin panel shows Active Cohort and Registering Cohort summary cards at top

mocked_apis.payments: Razorpay payments are MOCKED (no API keys configured)
